provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, gold signet ring, warm polished gold band with a single oval emerald in a raised prong setting, the emerald has rich deep green color with subtle internal facets catching light, the gold band has a comfortable rounded profile and shows warm reflections, simple elegant design suggesting nobility
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Gold ring with large emerald, ornate band. Beautiful but photorealistic — looks like a jewelry advertisement. Fails STY-001 painterly requirement.
